title: DefenStar 5000
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''DefenStar 5000''' was a [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shield]] system produced by [[Hibomehrt-Wyrrgex]]. Each shield station protected a 100-square-kilometer area, cost 500,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], and required a 150-being crew.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-06-XX -->''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''
